Best regards, Simone.
Can you also forward it to the legal team?
Could you please reply by Friday?
Could you please send me the document?
Could you please send me the file?

Excellent. How do you close the email?

Forward
Great. Please attach the signed document.
Hi Simone, did you send the email to the client?
I always write Best regards and my name.
I am not sure I understand. Could you explain?
I am not sure how to say this in English.
I am writing regarding the contract.
I look forward to your reply.
I often draft contracts in the afternoon.
I usually start work at nine o’clock.
I will follow up next week.
I will forward the email to the legal team.
I will. I will also follow up on Monday.
Not yet. I am writing it now, regarding the new contract.
Of course. I will add it as an attachment.
Perfect. Ask them to reply by Friday.
Please find the document attached.
Please find the report attached.
Recipient
Regarding
Reply
Subject line
Sure. I will forward it to them today.
Thank you for your patience.
That is very professional. Thank you, Simone.
You are welcome. I will send it now.

Simone opens a new email and writes the subject line and the recipient. She adds the contract as an attachment. She writes a short message regarding the contract. She closes with Best regards and her name. Then she sends the email and follows up the next week.

Dear Mr. Carter. I am writing regarding the service contract for Telefonica. Please find the signed document attached. Could you please review it and reply by Friday? If you have any questions, let me know. Best regards, Simone.

Hello, this is Simone from Telefonica. I am following up on the email I sent last week regarding the contract. I have not received your reply yet. Could you please confirm that you received the attachment? Thank you, and best regards.
